mapper.select: SELECT batch_id, create_time, update_time, status, original_filename, message, file_count, CASE status WHEN 0 THEN '处理中' WHEN 1 THEN '已处理' WHEN 2 THEN '处理失败' ELSE '未知' END AS status_desc FROM haosen_project..hr_batch WHERE batch_id = #{batchId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO haosen_project..hr_batch (batch_id, create_time, update_time, status, original_filename, message, file_count) VALUES (#{batchId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status}, #{originalFilename}, #{message}, #{fileCount})
